history.hypothesis:
def predict(key, box) -> bool:
    # Hypothesized correct key for each box based on shapes (and evidence for red):
    # - red box -> red key (no moon-shaped key; prior success observed)
    # - pink (cloud) -> cloud key
    # - white (diamond) -> diamond key
    # - purple (heart) -> heart key
    # - blue (triangle) -> triangle key
    mapping = {
        "red": "red",
        "pink": "cloud",
        "white": "diamond",
        "purple": "heart",
        "blue": "triangle",
    }
    return mapping.get(box.id) == key.id
